ucs.title: [LLM] Play (Playcrypt) AdFind/NLTest discovery chained to PsExec lateral movement
ucs.description: Hunts the signature Play intrusion chain documented in CISA AA23-352A: hands-on-keyboard AD reconnaissance with AdFind.exe and nltest /domain_trusts followed within minutes by PsExec/PAExec deployment from the same staging host. This combination is a hallmark of the Play closed-group ransomware crew and is rarely benign together.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t min(_time) as disc_time values(Processes.process) as disc_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("adfind.exe","nltest.exe") AND (Processes.process="*domain_trusts*" OR Processes.process="*dclist*" OR Processes.process="*trusted_domains*" OR Processes.process="*objectcategory=computer*" OR Processes.process="*-f *")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*Get-ADDomain*" OR Processes.process="*Get-DomainTrust*" OR Processes.process="*Get-NetForest*" OR Processes.process="*Get-DomainComputer*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename process_name as disc_tool | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=t min(_time) as lat_time values(Processes.process) as lat_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("psexec.exe","psexec64.exe","paexec.exe","csexec.exe","psexesvc.exe") AND NOT match(Processes.user,"\$$") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename process_name as lat_tool ] | where lat_time>=disc_time AND lat_time<=disc_time+1800 | table disc_time, lat_time, dest, user, disc_tool, disc_cmd, lat_tool, lat_cmd | sort - lat_time
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowMinutes = 30;
let Discovery = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName in~ ("adfind.exe","nltest.exe")
             and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/domain_trusts","/dclist","/trusted_domains","objectcategory=computer","-f "))
        or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Get-ADDomain","Get-DomainTrust","Get-NetForest","Get-DomainComputer","Invoke-ShareFinder"))
    | project DiscTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              DiscTool = FileName, DiscCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where FileName in~ ("psexec.exe","psexec64.exe","paexec.exe","csexec.exe","psexesvc.exe")
   or (ProcessCommandLine has @"\\" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-accepteula","-s cmd","-c -f","-d -h"))
| join kind=inner Discovery on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (DiscTime .. DiscTime + WindowMinutes * 1m)
| project DiscTime, LatTime = Timestamp,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', Timestamp, DiscTime),
          DeviceName, AccountName,
          DiscTool, DiscCmd,
          LatTool = FileName, LatCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessTokenElevation
| order by LatTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 7d;
let WindowMinutes = 30;
let Discovery = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend BinName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\\")[-1]))
    | where (BinName in~ ("adfind.exe","nltest.exe")
             and CommandLine has_any ("/domain_trusts","/dclist","/trusted_domains","objectcategory=computer","-f "))
        or (BinName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
            and CommandLine has_any ("Get-ADDomain","Get-DomainTrust","Get-NetForest","Get-DomainComputer","Invoke-ShareFinder"))
    | project DiscTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, DiscTool = BinName, DiscCmd = CommandLine;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend LatBin = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\\")[-1]))
| where LatBin in~ ("psexec.exe","psexec64.exe","paexec.exe","csexec.exe","psexesvc.exe")
| join kind=inner Discovery on Computer
| where TimeGenerated between (DiscTime .. DiscTime + WindowMinutes * 1m)
| project DiscTime, LatTime = TimeGenerated,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', TimeGenerated, DiscTime),
          Computer, Account, DiscTool, DiscCmd,
          LatTool = LatBin, LatCmd = CommandLine
| order by LatTime desc
ucs.rationale: CISA #StopRansomware: Play (AA23-352A) and Trend Micro / Symantec reporting both call out the AdFind + nltest /domain_trusts + PsExec triad as Play's pre-encryption playbook. AdFind alone is occasionally legit (admins use it); PsExec alone is noisy. Joining the two on the same DeviceId within a 30-minute window strips out 99% of admin-tool noise and produces a near-zero-FP signal that maps directl

ucs.title: [LLM] Play ransomware encryption stage: .play extension fan-out paired with shadow-copy wipe
ucs.description: Detects the Playcrypt encryption-stage signature: high-volume creation/rename of files with the literal .play extension across many directories, correlated to vssadmin/wmic/wbadmin/bcdedit shadow-copy and recovery destruction on the same host within a 15-minute window. The .play extension is unique to this group's payload.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count as play_files min(_time) as first_play max(_time) as last_play dc(Filesystem.file_path) as folders_touched values(Filesystem.process_name) as sample_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_name="*.play" AND (Filesystem.action="created" OR Filesystem.action="renamed" OR Filesystem.action="modified") by Filesystem.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | where play_files>25 AND folders_touched>3 | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=t min(_time) as shadow_time values(Processes.process) as shadow_cmd values(Processes.process_name) as shadow_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND (Processes.process="*delete catalog*" OR Processes.process="*delete backup*")) OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*") by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` ] | where shadow_time>=(first_play-900) AND shadow_time<=(last_play+900) | table dest, first_play, last_play, play_files, folders_touched, sample_proc, shadow_proc, shadow_cmd | sort - first_play
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 3d;
let WindowMinutes = 15;
let ShadowDel = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete shadows")
        or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
        or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("delete catalog","delete backup"))
        or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "recoveryenabled" and ProcessCommandLine has "no")
    | project ShadowTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              ShadowProc = FileName, ShadowCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed","FileModified")
| where FileName endswith ".play" or PreviousFileName endswith ".play"
     or (FileName =~ "ReadMe.txt" and InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("explorer.exe","notepad.exe","winword.exe"))
| summarize PlayFiles = count(),
            FirstPlay = min(Timestamp),
            LastPlay = max(Timestamp),
            FoldersTouched = dcount(FolderPath),
            SampleFolder = any(FolderPath),
            EncryptorProc = any(InitiatingProcessFileName),
            EncryptorCmd = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine),
            EncryptorSHA256 = any(InitiatingProcessSHA256)
            by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where PlayFiles > 25 and FoldersTouched > 3
| join kind=inner ShadowDel on DeviceId
| where ShadowTime between (FirstPlay - WindowMinutes * 1m .. LastPlay + WindowMinutes * 1m)
| project DeviceName, FirstPlay, LastPlay, PlayFiles, FoldersTouched, SampleFolder,
          EncryptorProc, EncryptorCmd, EncryptorSHA256,
          ShadowTime, ShadowProc, ShadowCmd
| order by FirstPlay desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 3d;
let WindowMinutes = 15;
let ShadowDel = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | extend BinName = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName, @"\\")[-1]))
    | where (BinName == "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete shadows")
        or (BinName == "wmic.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
        or (BinName == "wbadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("delete catalog","delete backup"))
        or (BinName == "bcdedit.exe" and CommandLine has "recoveryenabled" and CommandLine has "no")
    | project ShadowTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, ShadowProc = BinName, ShadowCmd = CommandLine;
ImFileEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed","FileModified")
| where TargetFileName endswith ".play"
| summarize PlayFiles = count(),
            FirstPlay = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastPlay = max(TimeGenerated),
            FoldersTouched = dcount(TargetFilePath),
            SampleFolder = any(TargetFilePath),
            EncryptorProc = any(ActingProcessName),
            EncryptorCmd = any(ActingProcessCommandLine),
            EncryptorSHA256 = any(TargetFileSHA256)
            by DvcHostname
| where PlayFiles > 25 and FoldersTouched > 3
| join kind=inner (ShadowDel | project Computer, ShadowTime, ShadowProc, ShadowCmd) on $left.DvcHostname == $right.Computer
| where ShadowTime between (FirstPlay - WindowMinutes * 1m .. LastPlay + WindowMinutes * 1m)
| project DvcHostname, FirstPlay, LastPlay, PlayFiles, FoldersTouched, SampleFolder,
          EncryptorProc, EncryptorCmd, EncryptorSHA256,
          ShadowTime, ShadowProc, ShadowCmd
| order by FirstPlay desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Playcrypt .play Extension File Write
id: 1f0a4b6e-7e0d-4c3a-9a4b-3a4c8b9d5e21
status: experimental
description: Detects creation or rename of files with the .play extension, the unique encrypted-file marker used by the Play (Playcrypt) ransomware family (G1040). Single-event high-fidelity hit.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-352a
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1040/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/04
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.g1040
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_create:
    EventType:
      - FileCreated
      - FileRenamed
      - FileModified
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.play'
  filter_legit:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\explorer.exe'
      - '\OneDrive.exe'
  condition: selection_create and not filter_legit
falsepositives:
  - Files coincidentally named with a .play extension by media or game-development tooling (rare in enterprise environments)
level: critical
ucs.rationale: The .play extension is the literal payload signature of Playcrypt — CISA AA23-352A and Trend Micro both confirm Play overwrites files and renames them with .play (no per-victim suffix variation, unlike most modern strains). Pairing the .play fan-out with vssadmin/wmic/wbadmin/bcdedit recovery destruction on the same host within 15 minutes catches the actor's exact T1486 → T1490 sequence. Anti-fore
